prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2024年理科最低位次约503→594→548→447，近4年波动较大，2024年位次447为近年最优（竞争最激烈），较2023年大幅前移约101名；2025年基准位次数据缺 失，综合近年走势及2024年强势表现，推断2025年位次约460名左右；该校在青海省理科/物理类招生计划：2021年20人、2022年20人、2023年19人、2024年19人 ，近年保持稳定略有缩减；2026年物理类计划25人，较2024年扩招约6人（增幅约32%），扩招幅度较大，将显著缓解竞争压力，推动最低录取位次后移（数字增大）。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 2025年高考周期声誉评价为中性/混合，主要涉及宿舍食堂条件讨论，无重大负面舆情；2026年高考周期声誉评价转为偏负面（3起事件，2起 负面），涉及PPT贬低其他专业争议及考试作弊回应争议，可能对部分考生报考心理产生轻微抑制；抖音热度排名第66位（总106校），评价为"一般"，短视频平台曝光量中等，未 出现高热关注信号；第五轮学科评估中A-及以上学科达20个，其中化学工程与技术、管理科学与工程为A+，仪器科学与技术、光学工程、动力工程及工程热物理 、土木工程、城乡规划学、建筑学、机械工程、水利工程为A，化学、材料科学与工程、环境科学与工程、生物医学工程、电子科学与技术、电气工程、计算机科学与技术、软件 工程、风景园林学、数学为A-；工科实力极为雄厚，对理科考生有强大吸引力；天津大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年位列第20名（Top20），近年排名稳定在第20–22名区间，学校层次顶尖，对青海考生 吸引力持续强劲。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年招生专业均为工科试验班大类，涵盖智能水利、未来技术（具身智 能/AI/柔性电子等）、智慧环境与能源、新工科创新中心等前沿方向，与国家战略新兴产业高度契合，社会热度较高；青海省2026年高考总考生约48000人（不确定），较2025年 物理类30457人显著增加，考生规模扩大将加剧整体竞争，但扩招效应可部分对冲。；天津大学位于天津市，属东部沿海直辖市，对西部省份考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在青海省招生占比极小（2021–2024年均为3人左右，占全国招生总量 约0.4%），属典型的小名额招生，位次波动受个别高分考生填报行为影响较大。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2024年位次447为近年最优基准、2026年大幅扩招约32%（19→25人）推动位 次后移、青海省考生总数增加加剧竞争、学校声誉偏负面轻微抑制报考热度、优势学科群对理科生持续吸引等多重因素，扩招效应与考生增加效应存在对冲。经，plan_change约+32%，supply_demand约547），再结合考生规模扩大及声誉偏负面做小幅修正，预测2026年理科最低录取位次约537名，较2025年基准位次后 移（更易进）；波动区间472–602名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约537名，区间472–602名。位次在472–537区间建议以二档专业为主力、一档专业冲刺；位次在537–602区间建议以三档专业保底、二档专业为主；位次明显优于472名可 重点冲刺一档王牌专业（国家未来技术学院、新工科创新中心）。天津大学工科试验班大类招生后专业分流灵活，建议优先选择培养模式更优的班级。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2024, the minimum science ranking was approximately 503 → 594 → 548 → 447. In the past 4 years, there has been significant fluctuation. In 2024, the ranking of 447 was the best in recent years (most competitive), moving forward by about 101 places compared to 2023. The baseline ranking data for 2025 is missing. Considering the recent trend and the strong performance in 2024, it is inferred that the 2025 ranking will be around 460. The university's enrollment plan for science/physics in Qinghai Province: 20 in 2021, 20 in 2022, 19 in 2023, and 19 in 2024, remaining stable with a slight reduction in recent years. The 2026 physics enrollment plan is 25, an increase of about 6 (approximately 32%) compared to 2024, a significant expansion that will notably alleviate competition pressure and push the minimum admission ranking backward (numerical increase).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: During the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation was neutral/mixed, mainly involving discussions about dormitory and cafeteria conditions, with no major negative public opinion. In the 2026 cycle, the reputation turned slightly negative (3 incidents, 2 negative), involving controversies over PPT disparaging other majors and exam cheating responses, which may mildly suppress some candidates' application psychology. On Douyin, the popularity ranking is 66th (out of 106 schools), rated as 'average', with moderate short video platform exposure and no high-attention signals. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 20 disciplines rated A- or above, including Chemical Engineering and Technology, and Management Science and Engineering as A+, Instrument Science and Technology, Optical Engineering, Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics, Civil Engineering, Urban and Rural Planning, Architecture, Mechanical Engineering, and Water Conservancy Engineering as A, and Chemistry, Materials Science and Engineering, Environmental Science and Engineering, Biomedical Engineering, Electronic Science and Technology, Electrical Engineering, Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Landscape Architecture, and Mathematics as A-. The engineering strength is extremely strong, exerting a powerful attraction for science candidates. Tianjin University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 20th (Top 20), with stable rankings in the 20–22 range in recent years. The university's top-tier level continues to strongly attract Qinghai candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, all enrollment majors are engineering experimental classes, covering cutting-edge directions such as Smart Water Conservancy, Future Technology (Embodied Intelligence/AI/Flexible Electronics, etc.), Smart Environment and Energy, and New Engineering Innovation Center, highly aligned with national strategic emerging industries and enjoying high social popularity. The total number of candidates in Qinghai Province for the 2026 college entrance examination is about 48,000 (uncertain), a significant increase from the 30,457 physics candidates in 2025. The expansion of the candidate pool will intensify overall competition, but the enrollment expansion effect can partially offset this. Tianjin University is located in Tianjin, a eastern coastal municipality, which has a strong regional attraction for candidates from western provinces. The university's enrollment proportion in Qinghai is very small (about 3 people each year from 2021 to 2024, accounting for about 0.4% of the total national enrollment), typical of small-quota enrollment, where ranking fluctuations are greatly influenced by the application behavior of individual high-scoring candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2024 ranking of 447 as the best baseline in recent years, the significant enrollment expansion of about 32% in 2026 (19→25 people) pushing the ranking backward, the increase in the total number of candidates in Qinghai Province intensifying competition, the slightly negative reputation mildly suppressing application enthusiasm, and the continuous attraction of advantageous disciplines to science candidates, the expansion effect and the candidate increase effect offset each other. After plan_change of about +32% and supply_demand of about 547, with minor corrections for the candidate pool expansion and slightly negative reputation, the predicted minimum admission ranking for science in 2026 is about 537, which is backward (easier to enter) compared to the 2025 baseline ranking. The fluctuation range is 472–602.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 537, with a range of 472–602. For rankings in the 472–537 range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main force and aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch. For rankings in the 537–602 range, it is recommended to use Tier 3 majors as a safety net and Tier 2 majors as the main force. For rankings significantly better than 472, focus on aiming for Tier 1 flagship majors (National Future Technology College, New Engineering Innovation Center). After Tianjin University's engineering experimental class enrollment, major selection is flexible, so it is recommended to prioritize classes with better training models.
